title: Menorca Partridge Fair (Fira de la Perdiu)
description: A traditional hunting and rural fair that every February gathers partridge enthusiasts in Es Mercadal, with displays of the finest specimens and decoys. Organised by Menorca's Partridge Hunters' Society with the Consell Insular, it is a celebration of country culture rather than gastronomy. 2026 date approximate; confirm the official programme.
